name: Flush DNS Cache
description: Clears the local DNS resolver cache.

name: Register DNS
description: Refreshes dynamic DNS registration.

name: Release IP Address
description: Releases the current DHCP lease.

name: Renew IP Address
description: Requests a fresh DHCP lease.

name: Winsock Reset
description: Resets the Winsock catalog.

name: TCP/IP Stack Reset
description: Resets IPv4 and IPv6 TCP/IP settings.

name: System File Checker
description: Scans and repairs protected Windows system files.

name: DISM CheckHealth
description: Checks for image corruption flags.

name: DISM ScanHealth
description: Performs a deeper scan for image corruption.

name: DISM RestoreHealth
description: Attempts to repair Windows component store corruption.

name: Force Group Policy Update
description: Refreshes local and domain Group Policy.

name: Reset Microsoft Store Cache
description: Clears the Store cache.

name: Restart Explorer
description: Restarts the Explorer shell process.
command: Get-Process explorer -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Process explorer.exe

name: Clear Temp Files
description: Clears common user and Windows temporary folders.
command: $paths = @($env:TEMP, 'C:\Windows\Temp'); foreach ($path in $paths) { if (Test-Path $path) { Get-ChildItem -Path $path -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-Item -Force -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }

name: Restart Print Spooler
description: Restarts the Print Spooler service.

name: Restart BITS
description: Restarts the Background Intelligent Transfer Service.

name: Resync System Time
description: Resynchronizes the Windows time service.

name: Windows Update Reset Helper
description: Stops update services and refreshes SoftwareDistribution and Catroot2.
command: $stamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMddHHmmss'; Stop-Service wuauserv,bits,cryptsvc -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Rename-Item 'C:\Windows\SoftwareDistribution' ('SoftwareDistribution.bak.' + $stamp) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Rename-Item 'C:\Windows\System32\catroot2' ('catroot2.bak.' + $stamp) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Service cryptsvc,bits,wuauserv -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

name: CHKDSK Scan
description: Performs an online disk scan.

name: CHKDSK Fix
description: Schedules a disk fix and may require a reboot.
confirmationText: CHKDSK /f can schedule file system repairs and may require a reboot. Continue?

name: CHKDSK Surface Scan
description: Schedules a sector scan and recovery pass. This can take a long time.
confirmationText: CHKDSK /r can take a long time and may impact the disk heavily while scanning. Continue only if you understand the risk.
